name: Giorgione® 12 Pieces Brush Set
description: Description Our brushes double grip the bristles with extra strong ferrules so that the bristles always stay on the brush When you order a set of brushes, you will receive 12Pcs Giorgione nylon artist brushes in various shapes and sizes for maximum accuracy. They are used in acrylic, oil painting, watercolor, gouache, face painting, nail painting, or body painting to meet all your painting needs Paintbrush handles made from natural wooden materials, making them non-toxic and odorless. it is hard and straight and fits most hand sizes, which provides you with maximum comfort, even during extended painting Aluminum alloy gift packaging, accessories including hand-held acrylic bag + carbon pencil + manual and sponge block, is the best gift for artists The 3 layers of coating and the heavy glue on the head of wood make it perfect for soaking in water for more than 48 hours. After finishing your work, you can easily just put them in the sink and wash it whenever you want.

name: Giorgione® 12 Watercolor Cakes Set
description: Description Brand : Giorgione Includes Paint Brush, Pencil, Sharpener, Water Sponge, Eraser, Water brush, White Color Tube and 48 water color blocks Richly saturated pigment make color vibrant. It goes on extra-smooth, perfect for layering, blending, and shading. First choice for drawing, sketching, and adult coloring. This Watercolor Set makes the perfect Christmas and birthday gift for beginning artists, adults, kids, girls, grand children, daughters and sons. These are the perfect set to add to a coloring book gift.
